final_result: Coffee House Too Cafe (Restaurants, Breakfast & Brunch, American (New), Cafes)

messages.content:
Question: Which business received the highest average rating between January 1, 2016 and June 30, 2016, and what category does it belong to? Consider only businesses with at least 5 reviews.

Available databases: yelp_db, user_database

Available schema:
Database: yelp_db (mongodb)
Database: user_database (duckdb)
  Table: review — review_id, user_id, business_ref, rating, useful, funny, cool, text, date
  Table: tip — user_id, business_ref, text, date, compliment_count
  Table: user — user_id, name, review_count, yelping_since, useful, funny, cool, elite

function.name: query_db
function.arguments: {"database": "user_database", "query_type": "sql", "query": "SELECT business_ref, AVG(rating) as avg_rating, COUNT(*) as review_count FROM review WHERE date >= '2016-01-01' AND date <= '2016-06-30' GROUP BY business_ref HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY avg_rating DESC, review_count DESC LIMIT 10;"}
